title: Infosys to Hold Investor AI Day in Bengaluru on February 17, 2026
detailed_summary: Infosys announced that it will hold an Investor AI day in Bengaluru on February 17, 2026. The agenda will be finalized later. The event proceedings will be webcast live on the company’s website, and presentations and discussion transcripts will be hosted there subsequently.

key_facts.fact: Infosys will hold an Investor AI day in Bengaluru on February 17, 2026.
The agenda of the event will be finalized in due course.
The proceedings of the event will be webcast live on the Company's website, and presentations and transcripts of discussions will also be hosted on the Company's website subsequently.

important_text_spans.text: the Company will hold an Investor AI day in Bengaluru on February 17, 2026.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the event timing and location.

important_text_spans.text: The proceedings of the event will be webcast live on the Company's website at https://www.infosys.com/.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the availability of live event access.

sample_questions: When will Infosys hold its Investor AI day?
Where will Infosys host the Investor AI day in 2026?
Will Infosys webcast the Investor AI day proceedings?

processing_notes: Marked non-material because the document only announces an investor event schedule and access details, with no disclosed strategy, financial impact, guidance, product launch, deal, or operating update.
